message:
feat(web): add SecurityHeadersMiddleware with configurable security policy (asupersync-3a7ws)

Add SecurityHeadersMiddleware that bundles standard HTTP security headers
(X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, HSTS, CSP,
Permissions-Policy) into a single middleware layer with if-missing semantics.
Includes SecurityPolicy with sensible defaults and builder methods.

11 tests covering default/custom/none policies and no-overwrite behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
